name: Pacific Current Group Limited
analysis: PAC has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Trade setup: entry A$10.8455, stop A$10.1673, target A$10.9800. Risk/reward is 0.20:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
